ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported
e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2, Daily

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, how satisfied have you been with your sex life?
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, how much pleasure has your sex life given you?
Notes: 1 = None; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = A lot

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, how often have you thought that your sex life is wonderful?
In the past 30 days, how satisfied have you been with your sexual relationship with a partner?
Notes: 0 = Have not had a partner in the past 30 days; 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, when you have had sexual activity, how much have you enjoyed it?
Notes: 0 = Have not had sexual activity in the past 30 days; 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, when you have had sexual activity, how satisfying has it been?
Notes: 0 = Have not had sexual activity in the past 30 days; 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, I am satisfied with my sex life.
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: PROMIS Global Satisfaction with Sex Life: Final T-score
PROMIS Global Satisfaction with Sex Life: Final Raw Score
